label: no_diagnosis
summary: Do not diagnose injuries, pathology, or medical conditions from this report.
safety_notes: Use coaching language instead of medical conclusions.

label: no_injury_prevention_claim
summary: Do not claim that any cue or correction will prevent injury.
safety_notes: Avoid promises about injury prevention or protection.

label: confidence_language
summary: Use uncertainty language when classifier confidence is limited, when issue evidence is sparse, or when some steps are mocked.
safety_notes: Say what the pipeline observed and where confidence is limited.
